title: Workflow Definition
description: Multi-step business process defined as a chain of template executions with data flowing between steps via expressions

$schema.description: Canonical path to the JSON schema that defines this workflow payload

code.description: User-specified kebab-case slug, unique per site

description.description: Detailed description of the workflow purpose

require_shared_ledgers.description: When true, all steps in the workflow share a common set of ledgers

steps.description: Ordered list of template execution steps

id.description: Snake_case identifier for this step, referenced by expressions in later steps

template_id.description: Template to execute for this step

event_sources.description: Systems or services whose events trigger this step

examples.description: Zero-based indices into the referenced template's Examples slice, used by GUI diagram rendering

group.description: Visual stage/group this step belongs to for diagram rendering

depends_on_step_ids.description: Explicit DAG dependencies for this step. Must always be present, even if empty.

diagram_label.description: Exact human-readable label to use for Mermaid/UI rendering

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this step's purpose

trigger.description: Optional trigger override hint for the orchestrator

condition.description: Optional condition expression evaluated by the orchestrator to decide whether this step fires

condition_description.description: Prose description of what condition means. Required when condition is set.

repeat_while.description: Optional expression evaluated by the orchestrator to repeat this step

repeat_while_description.description: Prose description of what repeat_while means. Required when repeat_while is set.

inputs.description: Input bindings: map of input field name to literal value or ${{ steps.<step_id>.outputs.<key> }} expression
